tests.name: OTP utils generates a six digit OTP string

OTP utils resendOtp throws when the resend window has not passed
OTP utils resendOtp refreshes the OTP and increments resendCount
OTP utils verifyOtp rejects missing OTP records
OTP utils verifyOtp deletes expired OTP records
OTP utils verifyOtp increments attempts for invalid codes
OTP utils verifyOtp returns pending user and clears the OTP for valid codes
username utils exports the requirements message
username utils normalizes and strips unsupported characters
username utils validates usernames against the regex
username utils returns false for empty username availability checks
username utils checks username availability with and without excluded user id
username utils builds a cleaned base from sufficiently long seeds
username utils falls back to a random user seed when the cleaned seed is too short
username utils preserves suffixes while enforcing the maximum length
username utils generates the first available candidate
username utils throws when no candidate becomes available within the retry limit
handleError creates an Error with statusCode and message
